para.verbatim: constructs a matrix from its 2 columns; use this method to get the matrix that transforms basis vectors ( plusX, plusY ) into vectors ( x, y ) respectively
constructs a matrix from its 2 rows
returns a matrix that scales uniformly
returns a matrix that has its own scale along each axis
NOTE: We use `std::declval()` in the operators below because libclang 18 in our binding generator is bugged and chokes on decltyping `a.x` and such. TODO fix this when we update libclang.
compute sum of squared matrix elements

Generated from: MR::Matrix2i64 Aliases: Vector2_long_MatrixType
arbitrary 2x2 matrix
